name: @intentsolutionsio/zai-cli
description: Z.AI vision, search, reader, and GitHub exploration via CLI and MCP. Analyze images, search the web, read pages as markdown, explore repos.

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install zai-cli\\n  or /plugin install zai-cli@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
